rows.need: preserve negation scope before committing extracted claims
rows.title: Semantic Negation Lens

rows.need: bind configuration keys to values without treating them as prose claims
rows.title: Config Key / Value Lens

rows.need: bind ordered items to rank position and sorting criterion
rows.title: Ranking / Order Lens

rows.need: bind cause and effect spans without flattening them into unrelated claims
rows.title: Causal Link Lens

rows.need: bind a term to its local definition or alias without global overreach
rows.title: Definition / Alias Lens

rows.need: bind duration spans separately from clock time or deadlines
rows.title: Temporal Duration Lens

rows.need: bind numeric thresholds to direction and target
rows.title: Threshold Boundary Lens

rows.need: ground comparative claims to compared objects and metric
rows.title: Comparison / Superlative Lens

rows.need: ground aggregate operations to grouping key and measured field
rows.title: Aggregation / Group-By Lens

rows.need: bind quoted or reported content to its source instead of adopting it as direct fact
rows.title: Reported Speech / Quote Lens

rows.need: bind old and new states without stale-state reuse
rows.title: State Transition Marker Lens

rows.need: bind compatibility statements to version/platform/dependency scope
rows.title: Compatibility Requirement Lens

rows.need: detect stale API/tool references and bind replacements
rows.title: Deprecation / Replacement Lens

rows.need: detect citation markers and keep them attached to the cited claim
rows.title: Citation / Footnote Marker Lens

rows.need: bind URL query parameters to their values without losing endpoint context
rows.title: URL Query Parameter Lens

rows.need: avoid collapsing double-negative phrasing into the wrong polarity
rows.title: Double Negative Guard

rows.need: bind identity/equality claims without collapsing nearby alternatives
rows.title: Identity / Equality Lens

rows.need: separate procedure descriptions from result claims
rows.title: Method / Result Split Lens

rows.need: ground limitations and future-work caveats before broad reuse
rows.title: Limitation / Future Work Lens

rows.need: ground probability or odds statements with denominator and subject
rows.title: Probability / Odds Lens

rows.need: ground resource constraints before choosing an action or mode
rows.title: Resource / Budget Constraint Lens

rows.need: bind form instructions to the correct field/action
rows.title: Form Field Instruction Lens

rows.need: preserve weak-source caveats before committing claims
rows.title: Source Reliability Caveat Lens

rows.need: ground completion criteria before marking a task complete
rows.title: Acceptance Criteria Lens

rows.need: treat inline code spans as identifiers or literals rather than normal prose
rows.title: Inline Code Identifier Lens

rows.need: ground technical standard references as opaque spec identifiers
rows.title: Standard / Spec Reference Lens

rows.need: detect redaction placeholders and avoid hallucinating hidden content
rows.title: Redaction Placeholder Lens

rows.need: detect inline JSON arrays as structured data instead of prose lists
rows.title: Serialized JSON Array Lens

rows.need: bind dosage, unit, and frequency without over-broad medical claims
rows.title: Medical Dosage Span Lens

rows.need: detect figure/table captions and preserve caption scope
rows.title: Figure Caption Lens

rows.need: bind quality caveats to the affected evidence or metric
rows.title: Data Quality Caveat Lens

rows.need: detect scientific notation spans and preserve exponent/value meaning
rows.title: Scientific Notation Lens

rows.need: detect shell command pipelines and keep commands separate from explanatory text
rows.title: Command Pipeline Lens

rows.need: detect algorithmic complexity notation and preserve its symbolic meaning
rows.title: Complexity Notation Lens

rows.need: bind hyperparameter names to values and keep them out of ordinary numeric claims
rows.title: Hyperparameter Assignment Lens

rows.need: ground confidence intervals as interval evidence, not exact values
rows.title: Confidence Interval Lens

rows.need: preserve disclaimer scope without treating it as the primary answer
rows.title: Safety Disclaimer Scope Guard

rows.need: detect patch hunk boundaries and distinguish additions from deletions
rows.title: Patch Hunk Boundary Lens

rows.need: preserve the base of percentage claims
rows.title: Percentage Base Guard

rows.need: bind stack trace frames to location and failure context
rows.title: Stack Trace Frame Lens

rows.need: connect footnote markers to support text without treating markers as content
rows.title: Footnote Marker Lens

rows.need: ground HTTP method, endpoint, and status response as protocol structure
rows.title: HTTP Status / Endpoint Lens

rows.need: ground stacktrace frames as diagnostic structure
rows.title: Stacktrace Frame Lens
